subcodes.first_line: O friends of God in Jásb! There hath befallen Us in the path of God that which befell certain ones among My loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله فی الجاسب قد ورد علینا فی سبیل الله ما ورد علی بعض اولیائی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital
